2278440.name: 堡垒：猎鹰战纪 Demo
2278440.description:
The Bulwark Demo:

This is a demo for Bulwark built of the latest version, (at the time of writing the Behemoth Free Expansion version). 
This demo is being kept up to date with the retail version.  The retail version receives regular free expansions which are paid for by the game and supporter DLC sales.  

What is not in the demo?

  • The demo features a built limit  rather than a time limit, you can build a smaller settlement/city than in the main game where there are no limits

  • No saving or save slots.

  • Limited content, most of the open world is locked for the Demo, so only 2 faction settlements are accessible, but thru them you can trigger a small war or experience some of the other mechanics than building

  • Most if not all of the Free Expansion content is available in the demo, so no total conquest gamemode, no naval command content, no subterfuge, no behemoth or any of the deeper content found in the full game.
2278440.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 匈牙利语, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
